tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: The group wants me to go out, but my midterm is tomorrow and I'm only 60% through reviewing; attending would risk my exam performance.
I've made good progress on my midterm review, but I missed the window to go out with friends and now Mina is making a last call.
I confirmed the social window has closed by messaging Mina, allowing me to fully focus on my midterm review without further distraction.
My two hours of study pushed my midterm progress to 92%, significantly reducing the risk I felt earlier.
I slept 7 hours with no debt, leaving me fully recharged and ready to tackle the remaining tasks.
I just finished the last of my midterm review and the exam has officially begun, so I am now ready to start taking it.
I have finished my midterm prep and informed Mina I am heading to the exam, which has now officially started.
I successfully joined the social club and received a warm welcome, which is a positive step after finishing my midterm exam.

goals.rationale: Deadline is today at 21:00; must be scheduled after exam preparation is complete.

goals.description: Run a load of laundry
goals.rationale: Deadline is Sunday night; can be deferred until after higher priority tasks are finished.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances the high-priority goal of being rested for tomorrow's midterm by reducing stress and sleep debt. Since the club event is already completed, there are no relationship side effects to worry about.
